title: panel record — research contract (docs/specs/m6_v2_program_spec.md Phase 0)
description: One JSON object per line (JSONL) in data/panel/wayback_observations.jsonl and data/panel/panel.jsonl. Distinct from, and not governed by, the frozen site contract in data/schema/latest.schema.json. lifecycle_status is null on raw wayback/daily observation records and is assigned only at build_panel.py merge time (design rule 2); it is required to be present as a key but may be null pre-merge.

game_key.description: '{game_no}:{name-slug}' — guards game-number reuse across the 2015-2026 span.

obs_date.description: ISO date, page truth: parsed from the page's own 'as of' line (ET), never the capture timestamp.

capture_ts.description: ISO datetime UTC: CDX timestamp for wayback records, run timestamp for daily records.

capture_url.description: wayback URL, or the repo-relative data/history/YYYY-MM-DD.json path.

retrieved_at.description: ISO datetime UTC of when this record was fetched/derived.

content_hash.description: sha256 (hex) of the raw source bytes.

pu_interval.description: [lo, hi) pair modeling the 0.1-point rounding as interval censoring: [x-0.05, x+0.05), floored at 0. Never treated as exact.

lifecycle_status.description: Assigned at build_panel.py merge time; null on pre-merge wayback/daily observation records. exited_observed = last record shows 0% unsold or a scratchdates-confirmed end. exited_unobserved = the game vanishes between captures (interval-censored exit, final hidden value not observed).
